selectColumns.ColumnQuery:
CASE 
     WHEN PROVIDER_CLASS = 'SP' AND size(split(trim(replace(replace(PROVIDER_LAST_NAME,".",""),"#")),",")) > 1 AND length(split(trim(split(trim(replace(replace(PROVIDER_LAST_NAME,".",""),"#")),",")[1]), " ")[1]) = 1 THEN replace(trim(replace(split(trim(split(trim(replace(replace(PROVIDER_LAST_NAME,".",""),"#")),",")[1]), " ")[0],"-"," ")),"'","") --FirstName with a middle initial
     WHEN PROVIDER_CLASS = 'SP' AND size(split(trim(replace(replace(PROVIDER_LAST_NAME,".",""),"#")),",")) > 1 THEN replace(replace(trim(replace(replace(trim(replace(replace(PROVIDER_LAST_NAME,".",""),"#")),"-"," "),",")),trim(split(trim(replace(replace(PROVIDER_LAST_NAME,".",""),"#")),",")[0]) ,""),"'","")
     ELSE trim(replace(replace(replace(trim(replace(replace(PROVIDER_FIRST_NAME,".",""),"#")),"-"," "),","),"'",""))
    END

CASE 
     WHEN PROVIDER_CLASS = 'SP' AND size(split(trim(replace(replace(PROVIDER_LAST_NAME,".",""),"#")),",")) > 1 THEN replace(trim(replace(split(trim(replace(replace(PROVIDER_LAST_NAME,".",""),"#")),",")[0],"-"," ")),"'","") --LastName if LastName has more than one in the array
     ELSE replace(trim(replace(replace(trim(replace(replace(PROVIDER_LAST_NAME,".",""),"#")),"-"," "),",")),"'","")
    END

CASE 
     WHEN PROVIDER_CLASS = 'SP' AND size(split(trim(replace(replace(PROVIDER_LAST_NAME,".",""),"#")),",")) > 1 AND length(split(trim(split(trim(replace(replace(PROVIDER_LAST_NAME,".",""),"#")),",")[1]), " ")[1]) = 1 THEN  replace(trim(replace(split(trim(split(trim(replace(replace(PROVIDER_LAST_NAME,".",""),"#")),",")[1]), " ")[1],"-"," ")),"'","")
     ELSE replace(trim(replace(replace(trim(replace(replace(PROVIDER_MID_INITIAL,".",""),"#")),"-"," "),",")),"'","")
    END
